title: festuca pratensis var. humilior
intro: Festuca pratensis var. humilior, commonly known as dwarf meadow grass, is a variety of perennial grass that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Festuca pratensis var. humilior can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
